subject.title: Issue #3572 Web API fixture-backed domain preset pilot

collectionBoundaries.approvalAuthority: human maintainers, Copilot/Codex review handling, required checks, and repository branch protection remain the approval authority
collectionBoundaries.reportOnlyReason: The report measures traceability and instrumentation readiness for one fixture-backed Web API pilot; it does not approve, merge, waive findings, implement a live endpoint, or add a policy-gate rule.

sourceArtifacts.description: Checked-in pilot report, scope memo, evidence path, and observations for the fixture-backed Web API pilot.
API contract fixture with request/response shape, invariants, and escalation rule.
Rendered Web API/BFF domain preset report.
ExecPlan v2 artifact connecting Issue intent, API contract evidence, domain preset report, tasks, verification, and stop rules.
Evidence Sprint measurement report for the Web API pilot.
Existing report-only req2run fixture used as compatible requirement-to-runnable metric evidence.
Reviewer-facing traceability preview for the Web API pilot PR.
Final review completeness is recorded after Copilot/Codex review on the actual PR; the PR number is not known at fixture creation time.
Final completion audit is posted after PR merge because final check rollup and review completeness are not known before closeout.

time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.purpose: Measure time from fixture-backed pilot start to first runnable local verification command in a deterministic report-only fixture.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.calculationMethod: Synthetic fixture window from pilot start marker to first runnable local fixture validation marker; not derived from live reviewer or CI timing.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.interpretation: The schema and report can represent timing evidence for a Web API pilot.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.limitation: Synthetic fixture timing proves instrumentation readiness only; do not infer review speed, implementation speed, or adoption impact.

evidence_coverage.purpose: Track how much of the required Web API pilot evidence chain is available before PR closeout.
evidence_coverage.calculationMethod: Required source artifacts marked present divided by all required source artifacts in this measurement report.
evidence_coverage.interpretation: Pre-closeout evidence is available for Issue, pilot report, API contract, domain preset, ExecPlan, measurement, req2run, and review preview.
evidence_coverage.limitation: Final review completeness and completion audit are intentionally unavailable until PR stabilization and merge.

missing_evidence_count.purpose: Keep missing closeout evidence visible before merge rather than implying the flow is complete early.
missing_evidence_count.calculationMethod: Count required artifacts marked present=false in this measurement fixture.
missing_evidence_count.interpretation: Two expected closeout artifacts remain until PR review and post-merge completion audit are recorded.
missing_evidence_count.limitation: This is a lifecycle state, not a failure, unless the PR is merged without review-completeness and audit evidence.

unresolved_claim_count.purpose: Confirm that the scoped Web API pilot claims have explicit dispositions.
unresolved_claim_count.calculationMethod: Count scoped report claims without evidence, limitation, deferral, or non-applicability disposition.
unresolved_claim_count.interpretation: The checked-in report scopes its claims to traceability, domain preset application, API contract visibility, and metric readiness only.
unresolved_claim_count.limitation: This does not prove runtime API behavior, implementation correctness, or absence of untracked claims outside the report.

review_rework_count.purpose: Measure actionable review-feedback clusters that require follow-up commits.
review_rework_count.calculationMethod: Collected after Copilot/Codex and maintainer review threads are handled on the actual PR.
review_rework_count.interpretation: Not yet collected at initial fixture creation time.
review_rework_count.limitation: The final completion comment must record review rework based on actual review threads.

deterministic_replay_pass.purpose: Record whether local fixture rendering and validation can replay the Web API pilot evidence package.
deterministic_replay_pass.calculationMethod: Pass when the documented render, ExecPlan validation, schema validation, docs checks, context checks, and verify-lite complete locally.
deterministic_replay_pass.interpretation: The checked-in evidence package can be validated without live external agent APIs.
deterministic_replay_pass.limitation: Local replay does not replace GitHub CI, Copilot/Codex review, or final PR completion audit.

manual_intervention_count.purpose: Track required human/operator actions and publication-boundary decisions for the pilot.
manual_intervention_count.calculationMethod: Count one operator decision to use a fixture-backed pilot because no live API target was provided, plus one required post-merge completion-audit action.
manual_intervention_count.interpretation: The main interventions are pilot selection and governance closeout.
manual_intervention_count.limitation: Manual intervention here is an intentional control and fixture-boundary decision, not necessarily product friction.

audit_discrepancy_count.purpose: Identify where completion-audit evidence cannot be truthfully claimed before final PR closeout.
audit_discrepancy_count.calculationMethod: Count audit notes where pre-merge artifacts would be misleading if described as final closeout evidence.
audit_discrepancy_count.interpretation: The flow must keep final audit wording in the post-merge Issue comment rather than the initial pilot report.
audit_discrepancy_count.limitation: This count is expected for a live PR closeout flow and should be re-evaluated after merge.

allowedClaims: Issue #3572 has a checked-in trace from Issue intent to API contract fixture, Web API/BFF domain preset report, ExecPlan v2, measurement fixture, PR assurance review preview, and planned completion audit.
The Web API/BFF domain preset can be rendered and connected to a deterministic pilot without live external APIs.
The pilot exposes API contract evidence for reviewer inspection.
forbiddenClaims: Do not claim production API behavior, live endpoint correctness, faster review, safer code, external adoption, or agent-vendor superiority from this single fixture-backed pilot.
Do not claim the PR is complete until Copilot/Codex review, required checks, full check rollup, and completion audit comment are recorded.
Do not treat report-only metrics as approval, waiver, or policy-gate enforcement.
claimBoundaries.notes: This report intentionally separates fixture-backed pilot evidence from post-merge PR completion audit evidence.

limitations: The selected API change is a deterministic contract fixture, not a runtime endpoint implementation.
The timing metric uses synthetic fixture timestamps and must not be used as speed or productivity evidence.
Review rework, final check rollup, and completion audit evidence are unavailable until the actual PR reaches final review and CI state.
summary: Web API pilot measurement for #3572: pre-closeout evidence coverage 8/10, missing closeout evidence count 2, unresolved claim count 0, deterministic replay pass true, manual intervention count 2, audit discrepancy count 1, and synthetic timing 8 minutes limited to instrumentation readiness.
